name: mcp-servers
description: Catalog of the YHA-owned stdio MCP servers (the .js files in bridge/mcp/) registered into the `mcpServers` register. The actual *.js scripts intentionally stay at bridge/mcp/ because absolute paths to them are baked into the user-state file bridge/mcp-registry.json — moving the scripts would require a registry rewrite. This module makes the catalog programmatic: with mcp-servers disabled, the register is empty and any future code that reads from the register (instead of the legacy registry file) sees no YHA-owned MCPs. Today the materialize step + autostart path still read mcp-registry.json directly; integrating those callers with the register is deferred to the harnesses-extraction phase.
